hero.title: Precision. Style. Identity.
hero.subtitle: Experience the art of traditional grooming with modern sophistication. Where every cut tells your story.

about.title: Craftsmanship Meets Style
about.subtitle: Where tradition meets contemporary excellence in men's grooming.
about.description: For over a decade, we've been redefining the barbershop experience. Our master barbers combine time-honored techniques with modern styling to create looks that are both classic and contemporary.

features.precisionDesc: Every detail matters in creating your perfect look.
features.premiumDesc: We use only the finest grooming products for your hair and skin.
features.personalizedDesc: Tailored consultations to match your unique style and needs.
